title: Brasília, DF — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Brasília is a city in DF with a population of 3,055,149. Brazil’s modernist capital, a UNESCO World Heritage city designed by Oscar Niemeyer, with the highest quality of life in the country.
